title: Bitdeer April 2025 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitdeer produced 166 bitcoins in April, representing a 45.6% increase from March. The company cited higher average self-mining hashrate from energization of SEALMINERs as the driver. The company energized 70 MW at its Tydal, Norway facility and 132 MW at Jigmeling, Bhutan in April. Combined with existing capacity, Bitdeer's global available power reached nearly 1.1 GW, with plans to reach 1.6 GW by June 2025. Mining rig development included SEALMINER A1 with 3.7 EH/s energized, SEALMINER A2 with 3.3 EH/s manufactured and 1.3 EH/s shipped to customers, SEALMINER A3 with prototype testing completed with positive results, and SEALMINER A4 development proceeding toward Q4 2025 tape-out. Bitdeer paused bitcoin mining construction at its Ohio facility, prioritizing discussions with multiple development partners and potential end users for HPC/AI instead. The company secured a $200 million loan facility from Matrixport Group at 9.0% plus market rates, secured by mining equipment.
